name: nebula-storage
description: Nebula Disk Organizer — disk usage maps, duplicate detection, similar photos, folder compare, and auto-organization for macOS and Windows
author: Nebula

extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: Nebula analyzes folders you choose to show where your storage goes. Grant access to include your Desktop.
extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Nebula analyzes folders you choose to show where your storage goes. Grant access to include your Documents.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: Nebula analyzes folders you choose to show where your storage goes. Grant access to include your Downloads.
extendInfo.NSRemovableVolumesUsageDescription: Nebula can analyze and compare external drives you choose.
